parsed.summary: This commit renames the npm scope and adds an interactive re-configuration menu to the setup command. Changes are confined to metadata files (package.json, marketplace.json, plugin.json), documentation (CHANGELOG.md, release_card.md, commands/setup.md). No executable code, authentication logic, or runtime state changes are present. The worst-case scenario is a stale brand string or a confusing markdown prompt, neither of which is a blocking material risk.
